name: destiny-vault-auditor
description: Local-first Codex workflow for auditing Destiny 2 DIM vault exports.

interface.shortDescription: Audit DIM vault exports with local review artifacts.
interface.longDescription: Run the local Destiny Vault Auditor workflow from Codex using user-provided DIM weapon and armor CSV exports, optional public source files, editable HTML review artifacts, and final DIM metadata CSV output.
defaultPrompt: Generate a Destiny vault review artifact.
Apply reviewed decisions to a DIM CSV.
